RichDescription:
P16, SP16.3, SP16.4, SP16.8. Asset lifecycle from acquisition to disposal
Including
Maintenance and Support: Involves maintaining equipment and infrastructure in good working condition to prevent downtime and ensure a smooth production process.
FRFS: Look at the other assets type if it is another value stream.

From product idea to customer delivery. Category: Product Development
Focus: Sales, offers, order, hardware, software, firmware
Typical owners: R&D, Digitalization, EA, PM
Output: A happy customer who are using the product
Customer Service and Support: This stream involves post-sales support, handling customer inquiries, managing warranties, and ensuring customer satisfaction.
Employee lifecycle from hiring to retirement

Product development from idea to launch.
Focus: Udvikling af produkt, hardware, software, firmware
Typical owners: R&D, Digitalization, EA, Product Management
Output: Et færdigt produkt klar til markedet
Maintenance and Support: Involves maintaining equipment and infrastructure in good working condition to prevent downtime and ensure a smooth production process.

DisplayName: Functional Area & Corporate Function - strategy update
RichDescription:
Distribution and Logistics: Involves the storage, handling, and transportation of finished products to different locations to meet customer demand efficiently.
Production to delivery process

P11, + more, SP14.2 Order to Cash: This stream covers the entire process from receiving a customer order to delivering the finished product. It includes order processing, production scheduling, manufacturing, quality control, packaging, and shipping.
From customer order to receiving payment
Change to Opertunity to Cash or Lead
Production Process: Involves the actual manufacturing operations including assembly, fabrication, quality assurance, and inspections to transform raw materials into finished products. Sub part of O2C

SP11.1, SP14.1 Procure to Pay: This involves the steps from procuring raw materials and components to paying suppliers. It includes supplier selection, purchase order creation, receiving goods, and processing invoices.
From identifying needs to paying suppliers.

Quality Assurance: Focuses on maintaining the desired level of quality in the product by implementing quality checks and managing quality control systems to ensure products meet specifications and standards.
Quotation to quality-assured delivery
Not the operational part, it is included in O2C and P2P
The Subscription-to-Pay (S2P) value stream encompasses the end-to-end lifecycle of managing supplier subscriptions and recurring services—from initial subscription setup to final payment
